'''[[Lieutenant Colonel/Legends|Lieutenant Colonel]] Kreen''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] of engineer [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] in the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. As the armed forces of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] invaded on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] Praesitlyn, Kreen was killed during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn|battle]].
